welcome.title: Roszkowice Palace
welcome.text:
Roszkowice Palace is a gem of 19th-century architecture that for centuries served as the heart of a thriving landed estate. From lands owned by the bishops of Wrocław, through the devastation wrought by the Tatar horde and the great Battle of Byczyna, to the golden age of the von Cramon-Taubadel family — this land and these walls conceal fascinating stories that shaped the identity of the region.

Today, after years of neglect, the palace is undergoing a thorough renovation. We are restoring the splendour of its historic character, caring for every detail so that this exceptional place can once again captivate with its eclectic style.
